metadata.source: Dev Community threads + GitHub activity + blog posts

people.name: batuhan
people.notable: Primary responder in Dev Community. Personally handles bug reports, prompt tweaking, and feature roadmap communication. Confirmed AI Chats, headless mode, webhooks on roadmap.

people.name: tulir
people.notable: Creator of mautrix bridge framework. Maintains WhatsApp, Telegram, Signal, Meta, Discord, Slack bridges. Legendary in Matrix ecosystem.

people.name: Kishan Bagaria
people.notable: Beeper founder. Contact for bridge bounty program (kishan@beeper.com). Maximum $50k bounties for new bridges.

people.name: hifi
people.notable: Created Heisenbridge IRC bridge. Active in self-hosting support. Published v1.14.2 with direct websocket support.

people.name: blqke
people.notable: Created beepctl (30 stars), the most popular community CLI tool for Beeper.

people.name: KrauseFx
people.notable: Felix Krause (former Fastlane creator). Created beeper-cli for read-only chat history.

people.name: lrhodin
people.notable: Building v2 Rust iMessage bridge (23 stars). Very active with daily commits. Submitted bridge-manager PR #73.

people.name: zachatrocity
people.notable: Created docker-beeper (56 stars), the most starred community tool. Runs Beeper Desktop in Docker.

people.name: Arjun Ram
people.notable: Highly active in Dev Community. Provided critical early feedback on MCP: chat ID issues, token efficiency, versioning concerns.

people.name: mimen1994
people.notable: First to publicly share AI writing style analysis workflow with Beeper MCP. Created beeper-messaging-tools and beeper-mcp.

people.name: keith
people.notable: Created poke-beeper-proxy for tunneling Beeper MCP. Active in testing Claude Desktop extension.

people.name: Highest
people.notable: Created Beeper-WinUI-Theme (4 stars) and matrix-line-messenger bridge (14 stars).
